response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, cloud-native RAG architectures, or vector databases — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentorship initiatives
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in work history
AI/ML experience appears incidental rather than core to roles; insufficient depth in GenAI production systems
Education lacks advanced degree; most roles are software engineering, not applied AI/ML consulting
